basics.name: Byungwoo Yoo
basics.label: CTO / Software Engineer / AI Lab Lead
basics.summary: Inspired by a professor's words, 'You have received the best education at a lower cost, so you must dedicate yourself to the country and its people,' I have worked as a core developer for LINE Messenger, used by 600 million people worldwide, and have led AI labs and engineering teams in various companies, driving innovation and growth.

work.name: Datarize
work.summary: E-commerce operating company's CRM SaaS platform
highlights: Established technical roadmaps and managed hiring and organization for BE, FE, Data, QA, and SDK chapters
Led AX transformation and AI hackathons, resulting in the launch of three AI products
Designed enterprise-oriented APIs and drove technical sales

work.name: Mathpresso
work.position: VP of Engineering / AI Lab Lead
work.summary: AI-based math problem-solving search platform 'QANDA' operating company
highlights: Led the only profitable B2B business unit, partnering with major education companies such as Mirae, Visang, and YBM
Led multiple AI research projects, including ML, search, and automatic calculator & content DB construction
Redesigned search and ML services, reducing infrastructure costs by over 50%

work.name: Kasa Korea
work.summary: Blockchain-based real estate revenue securities investment and trading platform 'Kasa' operating company
highlights: Oversaw the development of various features for API servers and trading engines, leading to the launch of the service

work.name: Buzzvil
work.summary: World's largest smartphone lock screen advertising platform 'Buzzscreen' operating company (used by over 2 million people daily)
highlights: Developed and optimized ad and content allocation logic for Buzzscreen
Improved search functionality, reducing infrastructure costs by 75% and providing faster response times
As a software architect, mentored other engineers to build robust and sustainable microservices using Clean Architecture and DDD, ensuring zero downtime

work.name: Slidejoy
highlights: Reached break-even point and secured funding before being acquired
Designed and developed the service using ad networks and introduced Spring Boot for the backend

work.name: NAVER
highlights: Improved transmission rates (75% to 99.5%) as the lead developer for NNI (NHN Notification Infra), a core library for LINE
Developed and contributed to the Android version of the Netty network library
Introduced MVP software design, significantly enhancing team performance

work.name: InfoBank / DOSA
work.summary: Worked at InfoBank and DOSA as an alternative to military service
highlights: Participated in the development of m&Talk and Samsung ChatON

education.area: Department of Electrical Engineering (minor in Business Administration)

publications.name: Explain with Visual Keypoints Like a Real Mentor! A Benchmark for Multimodal Solution Explanation
publications.summary: Proposed a multimodal benchmark (MathExplain) for identifying and explaining visual keypoints in math problem-solving explanations. Co-authored.

volunteer.summary: Provided AI policy and technical advice to Gyeonggi Province
highlights: Advised on the construction of Gyeonggi Province's generative AI project and conducted technical reviews
